data.narrative:
Reveal Technology is a Series A–stage defense and security company founded by Garrett Smith that has raised $30M+. The valuation analysis triangulates across a comparable universe of 10 peers: 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms, including same-stage benchmarks Stark Defence ($500M), Vatn Systems ($300M), Ares Industries ($150M), and NODA AI ($125M).

Two valuation methods are applicable. The peer-median approach yields $225M, reflecting the median across the 4 same-sector, same-stage comparables, with a range of $125M to $500M. The stage-progression method implies $2.0B, applying a 2.0x step-up multiplier to a $1.0B baseline derived from total capital raised. This method assumes near-term advancement to the next funding stage.

The triangulated range spans $191M (low) to $2.3B (high), with a median of $1.1B. This wide dispersion reflects tension between peer-relative benchmarking and forward-looking growth assumptions embedded in stage progression. The peer-median approach suggests Reveal likely sits in the lower-to-mid quartile of the Defense & Security Series A universe. Key uncertainties include revenue trajectory, customer concentration, and whether the company's technical differentiation justifies the step-up multiple. Additional clarity on revenue, burn rate, and customer contracts would narrow this range materially.
